name: timetree-mcp
description: Unofficial TimeTree MCP Server for personal use - access and manage TimeTree calendar data with MCP-compatible AI clients

scripts.test:build: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('.test-dist',{recursive:true,force:true})" && tsc --outDir .test-dist --rootDir src --declaration false --declarationMap false --sourceMap false
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run test:build && node --test tests/*.test.mjs
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm audit --audit-level=high
